name: Cloak of the Darkened Sun
description: Notes Part of the Agents of Oryx Abilities.
effects: Strike Precautions: HP Boost (+100 HP) for 4.5 seconds when used above 550 HP Cooldown: 5.5 seconds Stealth Guard: Restore 20 HP when hit while Invisible above 550 HP Emergency Ration: Restore 80 HP when hit while Invisible below 550 HP Cooldown: 4 seconds After exiting sneak: Fire 2 additional projectiles dealing damage equal to your Lethal Strike damage for 2.4 seconds. Sneak: Invisible for 5 seconds. After 1 second can be canceled by shooting. On Invisible end: Lethal Strike: Your weapon deals 60 (+3 per VIT > 24) and 45% (+1% per VIT > 24) of target’s defense as additional damage for 2.4 seconds MP Cost: 2 MP/proj Cooldown: 0.1 sec
